patches_applied.description: Server-time fallback for $stream_timestamp in M1 and M15 candle insertion blocks. When timestamp is absent from payload, both the future-candle guard and age staleness guard now always execute using server clock instead of being silently skipped.
patches_applied.lines_changed: M1 block: $m1_stream_ts fallback (lines ~1781-1786); M15 block: $m15_stream_ts fallback (lines ~1834-1839)

patches_applied.description: Stale data rejection HTTP status changed from 400 to 422 (Unprocessable Entity). Stale quote time is a business-logic validity failure, not a malformed request. Both rejection paths (unparseable timestamp and age > 300s) updated.

Fixed test label numbering in test-ea-market-stream.php. Tests now correctly numbered 1-11 with no duplicates. Stale test updated to assert HTTP 422. New Test 11 added for missing-timestamp-with-candle (BUG-001 regression guard).
patches_applied.lines_changed: Multiple echo label lines; added Test 11 block at end of test function
